headline: Will Uber Hit $100 This Year?
summary: Uber’s (NYSE:UBER) business is firing on every cylinder: 3.6 billion trips, 199 million monthly active platform consumers, and 50 million Uber One members now driving half of Gross Bookings. Yet the stock is down. Uber trades at $68.85, off 15.74% year to date, while non-GAAP earnings power compounds. Can shares reclaim $100 before 2027? That is the ... Will Uber Hit $100 This Year?

headline: An Avis renter got stuck with $2,600 in toll charges after the previous driver apparently stole the transponder
summary: A New Jersey man spent approximately 80 hours going back and forth with Avis and e-Tolls for nearly six months to get back the $2,656.76 charged to his account in invalid toll charges.

headline: Prediction: Will Lucid Stock Double This Year?
